overall.description: A stationary shot from a video game showing a medieval gothic interior with an ornate stone fireplace. A translucent ghostly figure drifts slowly on the left side of the frame, fading in and out of visibility. The scene features warm firelight illuminating carved stone architecture and polished floors.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic castle common room with large fireplace

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the fireplace area and the ghostly apparition

notable_agents.action: translucent ghostly figure drifting slowly near the wall, periodically fading in and out of visibility

entered.detail: large gothic fireplace with carved stone archway containing a burning fire
metal stand with fireplace poker and tools positioned next to the hearth
wooden seating furniture against the left wall near the ghost
large green potted plant in the corner behind the bench
polished stone tile flooring with circular pattern near the fireplace

segments.scene_description: A stationary view of a gothic castle interior centered on an ornate stone fireplace with a warm burning fire. To the left, a translucent ghostly figure drifts slowly near a wooden bench, periodically fading in and out of view. The room features polished stone floors and detailed carved architecture, illuminated primarily by the flickering firelight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric gaze upon a gothic castle interior where the flickering warmth of a hearth contrasts with a haunting spectral presence. It begins with a centered view of an ornate stone fireplace, its burning fire casting dancing light across polished stone floors and detailed carved architecture. As the firelight pulses, a translucent ghostly figure drifts slowly near a wooden bench on the left side of the frame. The scene remains fixed in this somber stillness, with the ghost periodically fading in and out of visibility against the backdrop of the medieval hall.
